idea-plugin.name: Project Include Hierarchy
idea-plugin.description:
Adds a Project Include Hierarchy view for C/C++/Objective-C files in CLion.

  • Scope dropdown - reuse IDE scopes, including custom scopes from Settings, so expansion can stay inside the project areas you care about.
  • All Files (Including Excluded) - select this synthetic scope to bypass IDE scope checks.
  • Flat list toggle - collapse the tree into a deduplicated alphabetical list of unique includes.
  • Filter field - type to keep matching nodes, with matching descendants preserving their parent context.

Open via Navigate | Project Include Hierarchy, the editor context menu, or the Hierarchy menu while a C/C++ file is open.

action.description: Show the include hierarchy filtered by scope, with flat-list and text-filter options
